title: Microsoft restructures its Xbox division to make it more sustainable
summary: The company seeks to accelerate the release of first-party games and turn the division into a profitable business.

title: Nintendo's lawsuit against Palworld faces legal doubts
summary: Experts consider that Nintendo has little chance of winning the lawsuit against Pocketpair and that compensation would be minimal.

title: Artificial intelligence sparks debates in the video game industry
summary: From AI-created games to funding proposals and the use of the tool by veteran developers, AI is at the center of controversy.

title: Vanillaware wants to bring its games to PC but depends on publishers
summary: The Japanese studio is open to releasing more titles on PC, but the decision lies with the publishers.

title: Crimson Desert receives a patch that allows accumulating 100 pets and launches a video contest
summary: The update introduces a massive pet system and a contest to travel to South Korea.

title: The second season of X-Men '97 receives critical acclaim after its premiere
summary: The Marvel animated series combines nostalgia with a solid narrative and is acclaimed for its quality.

title: A sealed Super Mario Bros. cartridge sells for three million dollars
summary: The price surpasses the previous record for a vintage video game.

title: Firefighters investigate an explosion caused by a Meta Quest 3 in a Maine home
summary: The virtual reality device allegedly started a fire in the home.

title: Evo 2026 struggles to recruit competitors
summary: The fighting tournament fails to fill its participant slots this year.

title: Resident Evil Veronica was the most popular announcement of Summer Game Fest according to a study
summary: The game generated the most interest among all announcements of the event.

title: Fortnite OG announces the date and time for the Unvaulting event
summary: The event will allow unlocking classic weapons and items for a limited time.

title: Little Nightmares 3 presents The Puppeteer in a new trailer
summary: The video shows the new character and anticipates the game's release.

title: Onimusha: Way of the Sword will run at 60 fps on Switch 2
summary: The resolution and frame rate of the game on Nintendo's new console are revealed.

title: Death Stranding movie will not adapt the game's story
summary: The director confirms that the film will tell an original story in the same universe.

title: Palworld 1.0 will not delete player data, according to Pocketpair
summary: The studio assures that it is not necessary to reset progress, but recommends doing so.

title: The Blood of Dawnwalker will have free DLC and the studio already plans a sequel
summary: The open-world RPG will expand its content at no additional cost and is preparing a continuation.

title: Steam Machine and Steam Frame could launch in the near future, according to import records
summary: Valve remains silent, but customs records suggest new Steam hardware.

title: Final Fantasy 7 Rebirth director states that the trilogy's ending has been planned from the start
summary: Naoki Hamaguchi assures that the conclusion of the saga has been decided from the beginning.

title: An ambitious The Witcher 3 mod seeks to recreate a cut mission and is looking for voices for Geralt
summary: The project aims to restore cut content from the game and needs voice actors.

title: Warhammer 40K: Rogue Trader receives a massive patch that improves the weakest classes
summary: The update includes the new expansion and major adjustments for the role-playing game.
